calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-19-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Irene L. Tofft, CSR#12913.
Nguyen D. Luu, Esq., appearing for Petitioner Ivy Chau mother of minor present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined on her own behalf.
Proof of Publication on file.
Proof of Service to other parent on file.
No objections to the proposed change of names were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name for minor 1 from Brandon Donovan Chau to Brandon Chau Nguyen. The court also grants the petition for Change of Name for minor 2 from Courtney Chau Chhay to Courtney Chau Nguyen.
Decree Changing Name signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-25-2014 Reset To Feb-19-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840
Nguyen D. Luu, Esq., appearing for Petitioner Ivy Chau, mother of minors; present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.
Proof of Publication on file (Publication is incorrect).
The court waived further Notice to father of minor: Courtney Chau Chhay.
Declaration re: father of minor: Brandon Donovan Chau on file. (father unknown).

Court ordered matter continued to February 19, 2015 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for Publication of the Correct spelling of minor's names.
